# Taxi B&B GmbH

Taxi B&B GmbH is a licensed taxi and passenger transport company based in Essen, Germany. The company offers local and long-distance taxi rides, airport transfers, and on-demand booking services for private and business customers in the Ruhr region.

## Canonical Domain

https://taxibbessen.de

## Language & Market

- Primary language: German (de-DE)
- Market: Essen, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany

## Key Pages

- Homepage & booking: https://taxibbessen.de/
- Fleet / vehicles: https://taxibbessen.de/fahrzeuge
- About us: https://taxibbessen.de/ueber-uns
- Book a ride: https://taxibbessen.de/book
- Ride status: https://taxibbessen.de/fahrtstatus
- Legal notice (Impressum): https://taxibbessen.de/impressum
- Privacy policy (Datenschutz): https://taxibbessen.de/datenschutz
- Terms & conditions (AGB): https://taxibbessen.de/agb

## Contact

- Phone: 0201 707060
- Email: taxibb@outlook.com
